_comment: Capture map aligned to docs/plans/georgetown-walkthrough-script.md. Real routes; fill selectors with actz-may data-testids. Snippets <=8s. Roadmap beats are capturable:false — DESCRIBE them, never record as Live.

snippets.name: hub-landing
snippets._selfCorrected: viewport mobile->desktop: Chrome screencast wrote 0-byte webm at sub-desktop viewports; desktop records fine. object-fit:cover frames it in the deck.

snippets._selfCorrected: live DOM has no #town-ai-builder/#chat-input; the real control is a button with text 'Plan my georgetown trip' (clicked by text). viewport mobile->desktop for screencast.

snippets.note: Geo/interest push TARGETING is Roadmap. Do not record as Live — use a clearly-labeled mock overlay or a primed-device clip.
